nasb.text: It came about the next day, when the Philistines came to strip the slain, that they found Saul and his sons fallen on Mount Gilboa.

esv.text: The next day, when the Philistines came to strip the slain, they found Saul and his sons fallen on Mount Gilboa.

cnv.text: 第二天，非利士人來剝那些被殺的人的衣物的時候，發現掃羅和他的兒子都倒斃在基利波山上。

ccb.text: 次日，非利士人来剥阵亡者的衣物，发现扫罗及其众子横尸基利波山，
